goal: align repository documentation with current firmware and ESP bridge behavior, then commit and push
deliverable: documentation updates, governance receipts, verification evidence, git commit, and SSH push
constraints: do not overwrite existing user changes
use standard git commit prefix with Chinese description
keep unverified real-vehicle behavior explicitly marked as unverified
acceptance_criteria: README and serial protocol docs match current control-source policy
requirements and plans no longer contradict current code
product_acceptance_criteria: host and ESP consumers can understand current interface and control semantics
future tuning work has traceable requirement and plan records
manual_spot_checks: README control architecture and ESP sections
serial protocol control-source and IMU sections
git diff and status before commit
completion_language_policy: only claim pushed after successful git push; do not claim final real-vehicle calibration
delivery_truth_contract: documentation and repository delivery only, not real-world performance validation
autonomy_mode: autonomous execution from explicit user request
inferred_assumptions: current uncommitted code changes are intended for this delivery
local WPS logs are not part of the requested documentation delivery
